select_inverter.title: Select Host Inverter
select_inverter.description: Found {count} inverters on your account. Select the Host inverter — it controls the Grid Feed-in and cycle strategy settings.

reconfigure_select.title: Change Host Inverter
reconfigure_select.description: Found {count} inverters on your account. Pick the Host inverter to use for Grid Feed-in and cycle strategy settings.

forecast_setup.title: Solar Forecast Setup
forecast_setup.description: Optionally connect solar forecast sensors from forecast.solar or another integration. Leave the fields empty if you want to add them later.

error.auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your username and password.

abort.already_configured: This Home Energy Manager account is already configured.
abort.auth: Authentication failed. Update credentials and try again.
abort.no_inverters: No inverters were found on this account.
abort.provider_coming_soon: Selected provider is not implemented yet.

host_inverter_required.title: Host inverter not configured
host_inverter_required.description: This Home Energy Manager account has more than one inverter and no Host inverter has been selected. Grid Feed-in controls will not work until a Host is picked. Open Settings → Devices & Services, find the Home Energy Manager entry, click the three-dot menu and choose Reconfigure.
